changelog:
v1.0.9 Changes:

• Benchmark: GPU reference recalibrated to match reference system (4080 SUPER at ~420 FPS) — 9800X3D system now scores closer to ceiling as intended
• Benchmark: GPU sub-weights adjusted to 80/20 (FPS/variance) — aligns with industry norms while still rewarding frame consistency
• Benchmark: L3 Cache reference lowered to 31.0 GB/s — tuned 9800X3D with BCLK2 OC is the practical ceiling
• Benchmark: Importance labels fixed — GPU now MED for CPU-bound games, Memory now MED and Storage now LOW for GPU-bound games
• Benchmark: Score bars redesigned — full-width with raw values below each bar, cleaner layout
• Benchmark: DRAM Latency bar clarified with '(lower is better)' label
• Monitor Advisor: V-Sync recommendation now context-sensitive by refresh rate
• Monitor Advisor: G-Sync Pulsar support with competitive buying recommendations
• Monitor Advisor: ELMB/strobing tip for high-refresh monitors
• Monitor Advisor: Multiple Monitors rewritten — Extended vs Cloned displays, EDID capture card tip
• Fixed: Low Latency Mode — Off with Reflex, per-game NVCP profiles for multi-game setups
• Fixed: CTT debloat 'click RUN TWEAKS' reminder added
• Fixed: Gaming Tweaks script auto-applies with clear FINISHED message
